vehicle_location: Front top of engine bay between thermostat housing and radiator
quantity: 1 molded HJ47/2H upper radiator hose; 355 mm published free length; old-hose free length used only as match check
exact_recreation_spec: Spec-led molded EPDM upper radiator hose for Toyota Land Cruiser HJ47 2H route; Toyota 16571-68020 and Dayco DMH1342 / CH1342 are cross-references only; published DMH1342 free length is 355 mm; buy as molded hose unless fitted radiator/thermostat housing proves non-standard
material_spec: EPDM coolant hose, SAE J20R4 or molded equivalent
critical_measurements: Standard HJ47/2H molded upper hose accepted from engine/radiator images; sample-match on receipt and choose clamps by installed hose OD.
fit_and_test: Dry-fit with engine movement allowance; no fan/belt rub; pressure-test cooling system after fill
notes: Released for standard molded-hose shopping; dry-fit and pressure-test remain required before coolant fill.

vehicle_location: Front lower engine bay between radiator lower outlet and water pump/engine inlet
quantity: 1 molded HJ47/2H lower radiator hose; 480 mm published free length; old-hose free length used only as match check
exact_recreation_spec: Spec-led molded EPDM lower radiator hose for Toyota Land Cruiser HJ47 2H route; Toyota 16572-68020 and Dayco DMH1343 / CH1343 are cross-references only; published DMH1343 free length is 480 mm; buy as molded hose unless fitted radiator/engine inlet geometry differs
material_spec: EPDM coolant hose, SAE J20R4 or molded equivalent
critical_measurements: Standard HJ47/2H molded lower hose accepted from engine/radiator images; sample-match on receipt and choose clamps by installed hose OD.
fit_and_test: Dry-fit without kinks or rubbing; pressure-test cooling system after fill
notes: Released for standard molded-hose shopping; dry-fit and pressure-test remain required before coolant fill.

quantity: 1000 mm Longman hose quote/order length; 600 mm OE reference; cut to measured route
exact_recreation_spec: Small EPDM coolant overflow hose; Toyota 90445-12078 is a 600 mm reference length; quote/order 1000 mm Longman equivalent and cut to measured radiator-neck-to-reserve-bottle route
critical_measurements: Small EPDM overflow hose stock; quote/order 1000 mm and cut to vehicle route.
fit_and_test: Route downhill/cleanly with no kinks and no sharp edge contact
notes: Released for Longman hose-stock quote/order; final trim occurs on vehicle.

vehicle_location: Firewall/heater core and engine heater nipples
pipe_or_line: Front heater water inlet and outlet hoses
quantity: 400 mm inlet hose + 280 mm outlet hose cut lengths
exact_recreation_spec: Front heater inlet hose: 400 mm cut length; front heater outlet hose: 280 mm cut length; 16 mm ID / 5/8 in EPDM heater hose exact order basis. Toyota 99552-30500 / 99556-30500 and 99552-30300 / 99556-30300 are cross-references.
material_spec: EPDM heater hose, SAE J20R3 or better
critical_measurements: Standard 16 mm / 5/8 in EPDM heater hose exact order basis; cut 400 mm inlet and 280 mm outlet from released stock during install.
fit_and_test: Dry-fit through firewall/heater path without tight bends, exhaust contact, or chafe
notes: Released for heater hose stock shopping; final trim and chafe check occur during install.

vehicle_location: Loose May 2 sample for front engine cooling route
quantity: 1 x 28-30 mm OD, 1.2-1.6 mm wall tube blank; 1000 mm shop stock preferred, 750 mm absolute minimum blank
exact_recreation_spec: Recreate from physical sample using 28-30 mm OD coolant tube with 1.2-1.6 mm wall. Buy/quote 1000 mm shop stock if sold by meter; 750 mm is the absolute minimum blank before bending/trimming. Final centerline length must be measured from the physical sample. Match tube OD, wall thickness, bend radii, bend clocking, offset, 1.5-2.0 mm end beads, 25-30 mm straight hose clamp lands, and hose overlap in mm; visible planning envelope is roughly 400 mm vertical height and 250-300 mm upper offset but photos are not production dimensions.
material_spec: Mild steel/aluminized steel or 304 stainless coolant-compatible tube; target wall 1.2-1.6 mm after fabricator confirmation
critical_measurements: Exact released stock: 28-30 mm OD tube, 1.2-1.6 mm wall, 1000 mm shop stock preferred or 750 mm absolute minimum blank, 1.5-2.0 mm end beads, 25-30 mm straight clamp lands. Physical sample controls final bends and trim.
fit_and_test: Bench pressure-test before coating; dry-fit on vehicle; coat only after fit and pressure test
notes: Released for fabricator stock quote/template copy; physical sample copy, dry-fit, and pressure-test still control final installation.

vehicle_location: Loose May 2 sample for formed coolant pipe rubber joints
pipe_or_line: Formed coolant pipe rubber connector/coupler hoses
quantity: 2 connector hoses; quote/order 2 x 500 mm EPDM radiator hose blanks or 1000 mm total and cut to sample
exact_recreation_spec: Replace the two short rubber connector hoses visible on the formed coolant pipe assembly. Longman request: 2 pieces of EPDM radiator rubber pipe, 500 mm each, 28-30 mm ID exact order basis. Trim each connector shorter from the old coupler/sample during dry-fit; record pipe-end OD, mating neck/spigot OD, finished free length, hose overlap, bend/offset, clamp land, and kink clearance in mm. Use straight EPDM coolant hose only where the measured path stays round; otherwise sample-match molded EPDM connectors.
material_spec: EPDM coolant/radiator hose, SAE J20R3/J20R4 or molded coolant equivalent; new smooth-band or constant-tension clamps
critical_measurements: Two 500 mm EPDM radiator connector blanks, 28-30 mm ID exact order basis; cut from sample and trim during dry-fit.
fit_and_test: Dry-fit with RP-COOL-005 pipe; pressure-test cooling system; no swelling, seepage, kink, or clamp-edge cutting
notes: Released for Longman connector-hose quote/order; final kink and clamp placement checks remain during RP-COOL-005 dry-fit.

vehicle_location: Tank/chassis feed route to engine fuel filter plus injection pump / injector return area
pipe_or_line: Diesel feed return and injector leak-off rubber hoses
quantity: 1500 mm feed hose buy length for approximately 1200 mm measured feed route + 2000 mm return hose + 1000 mm injector leak-off hose
exact_recreation_spec: Diesel feed hose: 8 mm ID x 1500 mm buy length for the approximately 1200 mm measured tank-to-engine feed route; diesel return/bleed hose: 6 mm ID x 2000 mm; injector leak-off hose: 3.2-3.5 mm ID x 1000 mm; confirm every barb/nipple before purchase and cut to measured route
material_spec: Diesel-rated SAE J30R9, SAE J30R14T2, or DIN 73379-3E hose; braided diesel leak-off hose for injectors
critical_measurements: User measured long tank-to-engine diesel feed route at about 1200 mm; buy 1500 mm feed hose for trim allowance. Return remains 6 mm x 2000 mm; leak-off remains 3.2-3.5 mm x 1000 mm.
fit_and_test: No leaks, no air ingress, no rubbing on belts/exhaust, no unsupported chassis chafe, use rolled-edge fuel-injection clamps
notes: Released for diesel-rated hose shopping from user measured route; verify printed rating and leak-test after install.

vehicle_location: Chassis rail low-pressure fuel line route
pipe_or_line: Low-pressure fuel hard lines - feed and return
quantity: Conditional 5000 mm 8 mm OD feed tube only if separate rigid feed line exists + 5000 mm 6 mm OD return tube; cut to route from old samples
exact_recreation_spec: Replace old low-pressure hard lines with new tube where rigid lines exist; feed hard-line order is conditional because the measured tank-to-engine feed is now RPO-FUEL-001A 8 mm ID hose x 1500 mm. If a separate rigid feed section exists, use 8 mm OD tube; return order basis remains 6 mm OD tube; fabricate measured shorter sections and match original route, end style, section length, and clips
material_spec: New automotive bundy steel or CuNi/Cunifer tube; no bare copper
critical_measurements: Feed hard-line stock is conditional after confirming a separate rigid feed section; return hard-line stock remains 6 mm OD x 5000 mm allowance.
fit_and_test: Rubber-lined P-clips every 300-400 mm; no chafe; leak-test after fuel prime
notes: Do not duplicate the measured 1200 mm flexible feed hose with a hard-line order; copy old rigid line routes only where they exist.

vehicle_location: Vacuum pump / brake booster / crankcase breather area
pipe_or_line: Vacuum hose and breather/oil mist hose
quantity: 2000 mm vacuum hose + 1000 mm breather hose; oil-outlet hose replaced new if fitted
exact_recreation_spec: Brake booster/vacuum hose: new reinforced 10-12 mm ID x 2000 mm buy length; breather hose: new oil-resistant 16-19 mm ID x 1000 mm buy length; 2H vacuum pump oil outlet hose replaced new if fitted and measured as a separate molded item
material_spec: New reinforced oil-resistant vacuum hose; new NBR or fuel/oil-rated hose for breather; new OEM molded hose where shape is specific
critical_measurements: Standard new vacuum and breather stock order is released; final pump/booster/check-valve barb fit, check-valve direction, breather spigot fit, heat/chafe exposure, and oil exposure close at install.
fit_and_test: Verify brake assist vacuum, check-valve operation, and no hose collapse or oil swelling
notes: Order lines RPO-VAC-001A/B are released as Longman stock-length quote lines; RPO-VAC-001C is presence-gated and replaced new if fitted.

vehicle_location: Frame and axle brake hydraulic routes
pipe_or_line: Brake flex hoses and hard brake lines
quantity: 3 new complete flex assemblies + 7600 mm / 25 ft new 4.75 mm brake pipe coil allowance; cut/fabricate to old samples
exact_recreation_spec: Brake flex hoses: new front left, front right, rear center complete assemblies copied from old free length in mm and end fittings; hard lines: new 4.75 mm / 3/16 in tube OD, 7600 mm / 25 ft coil allowance, flare/thread/seat and old-line templates control final cuts
material_spec: New brake-fluid-compatible flex hoses; new bundy steel or CuNi/Cunifer brake tube with brake-rated fittings; no bare copper
critical_measurements: Brake images close route context and 4.75 mm tube stock basis; Longman/specialist quote basis is defined, but flex end fittings, old-sample length, flare/thread, bleed, pressure-test, and clearance remain safety held.
fit_and_test: Pressure bleed and leak-test; verify no stretch through normal axle movement and no tire/suspension contact
notes: Order/quote new components from Longman only if certified hydraulic capability is confirmed; otherwise use a brake hydraulic shop. Complete assemblies and brake-rated tube stock only; no generic rubber hose.

pipe_or_line: Clutch flex hose and hard line
quantity: 1 new complete flex assembly + 1500 mm 4.75 mm brake/clutch pipe blank
exact_recreation_spec: New clutch flex hose copied from old free length in mm and end fittings; new hard-line blank allowance 1500 mm x 4.75 mm / 3/16 in; final route cut from master-to-slave route
material_spec: New brake/clutch hydraulic-rated flex hose or brake-rated hard line
critical_measurements: Longman/hydraulic order lengths are defined; old parts are samples only.
fit_and_test: Bleed clutch hydraulics; verify no leak and no tension through drivetrain movement
notes: Use RPO-CLUTCH-001A/B as new replacement hydraulic pieces.
